positive: A neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape viewed through a rainy window. Focus on glowing Japanese kanji signs, flying vehicles, and reflective wet streets. Synthwave aesthetic, deep magenta, electric cyan, and indigo tones. Digital illustration, vaporwave style, high detail.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sepia, vintage, natural light, sketch
